description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on every push to all branches except travis_ccache and on all pull requests to those branches. The workflow has four jobs: clang-format, Linux, macOS, and Windows. The clang-format job checks code formatting using clang-format 9 on an ubuntu-18.04 environment. The Linux, macOS, and Windows jobs build and test the project using cmake and ctest on their respective environments with different compilers and generators.
